Weekly Pool Service

We Handle Everything

Our complete weekly service keeps your pool sparkling, balanced, and worry-free all year long.

Skimming & Debris Removal
We remove leaves, bugs, and debris from the surface.
Vacuuming
We vacuum your pool so it's clean from top to bottom.
Brushing Walls & Tile
We brush walls, steps, and tile for a spotless finish.
Chemical Testing & Balancing
We test and balance chemicals for safe, clear, healthy water.
Filter & Equipment Check
We inspect your equipment to make sure everything is running properly.
Service Report
You'll get a quick update after every visit for total peace of mind.
About Three Sixty Pool Care

Proudly Local. Committed to Our Community.

Three Sixty Pool Care is a locally owned and operated business right here in Ventura County. We're your neighbor — and we treat every pool like it's in our own backyard.

We know the local climate, the unique pool challenges in our area, and what it takes to keep your pool looking its best year-round. Our team lives and works in the community, and we're proud to build long-lasting relationships with the homeowners we serve.

Locally Owned & Operated
Based in Ventura County. Proudly serving our neighbors.
Reliable & Trustworthy
On-time, dependable service with clear communication.
Experienced Professionals
Trained technicians with years of hands-on experience.
Community Focused
We give back and support local events and organizations.
